query: What are the top AI news headlines today? Include sources.
textResponse:
Here are some of the **top AI news headlines today**, with source links:

1. **OpenAI hits 1 million paid business users**  
   OpenAI announced it now serves over one million paying business customers, up from 3 million in February. The milestone came alongside new enterprise-focused product updates, including productivity agents, coding tools, and connectors for services like Google Drive and SharePoint.  
   Source: Reuters ÔÇö ÔÇťOpenAI says it now has 3 million paying business usersÔÇŁ  
   https://www.reuters.com/business/openai-says-it-now-has-3-million-paying-business-users-2025-06-04/ ţłÇciteţłéturn0news14ţłü

2. **OpenAI debuts enterprise AI tools and coding agents**  
   At a recent event, OpenAI launched ÔÇťConnectorsÔÇŁ to let ChatGPT pull data from third-party apps and unveiled ÔÇťCodex,ÔÇŁ an AI coding agent for software engineering. The company also introduced ÔÇťRecord modeÔÇŁ for meetings and announced updates to improve workflow automation.  
   Source: Reuters ÔÇö ÔÇťOpenAI debuts business software to take on Microsoft's AI offeringsÔÇŁ  
   https://www.reuters.com/business/openai-debuts-business-software-take-on-microsofts-ai-offerings-2025-06-04/ ţłÇciteţłéturn0news15ţłü

3. **Mistral launches EuropeÔÇÖs first AI reasoning model**  
   French startup Mistral introduced ÔÇťMagistral,ÔÇŁ its first reasoning model, aiming to compete with OpenAI and Google while emphasizing multilingual support. The launch reflects EuropeÔÇÖs push to build AI champions amid growing U.S. and Chinese competition.  
   Source: Reuters ÔÇö ÔÇťFrench startup Mistral launches AI reasoning model to challenge US rivalsÔÇŁ  
   https://www.reuters.com/world/europe/french-startup-mistral-launches-ai-reasoning-model-challenge-us-rivals-2025-06-10/ ţłÇciteţłéturn0news13ţłü

4. **Meta signs major AI-data deal with Constellation Energy**  
   Meta agreed to a 20-year deal to buy nuclear power from ConstellationÔÇÖs Clinton Clean Energy Center, underscoring how AIÔÇÖs huge electricity needs are reshaping energy procurement. The move highlights the rising intersection of AI infrastructure and power markets.  
   Source: Reuters ÔÇö ÔÇťConstellation signs power deal with Meta as AI demand surgesÔÇŁ  
   https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/constellation-signs-power-deal-with-meta-ai-demand-surges-2025-06-03/ ţłÇciteţłéturn0news12ţłü

5. **Google researchers reportedly create low-cost AI model using Gemini outputs**  
   According to reports, Google researchers trained a model for under $50 using outputs from Gemini, raising fresh questions around synthetic data, efficient training, and AI model economics.  
   Source: TechCrunch ÔÇö ÔÇťGoogle researchers create shockingly cheap AI model from GeminiÔÇŁ  
   https://techcrunch.com/2025/06/05/google-researchers-create-shockingly-cheap-ai-model-from-gemini/ ţłÇciteţłéturn0news16ţłü

6. **Publishers urge tighter copyright rules around AI summaries**  
   Groups representing publishers asked the U.S. government to address concerns that AI-generated summaries and search features could undermine original journalism and reduce traffic to news outlets.  
   Source: Reuters ÔÇö ÔÇťNews/Media Alliance urges curbs on AI summaries in federal commentsÔÇŁ  
   https://www.reuters.com/world/us/newsmedia-alliance-urges-curbs-ai-summaries-federal-comments-2025-06-11/ ţłÇciteţłéturn0news17ţłü

7. **Scale AIÔÇÖs valuation reportedly rises sharply in tender offer**  
   Scale AI was reportedly set for a major valuation jump in a share sale process, reflecting investor appetite for companies supplying data-labeling and infrastructure services to the generative AI boom.  
   Source: Reuters ÔÇö ÔÇťScale AI tender offer values startup at nearly $14 billion, the Information reportsÔÇŁ  
   https://www.reuters.com/technology/scale-ai-tender-offer-values-startup-nearly-14-billion-information-reports-2025-06-03/ ţłÇciteţłéturn0news18ţłü
